data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for auto-charge execution and failure event trail.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the 'auto-charge execution + failure event trail', but there is no evidence provided that directly addresses this requirement. The linked use case mentions the need for an auto-charge execution and failure event trail, yet the prior steps do not include any checks or reads that confirm this functionality is implemented or available. Therefore, the evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure, leading to a blocked status.
gaps: No evidence of auto-charge execution and failure event trail validation.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
